input_case: A claim moves from collection lead to finished judgment without documenting analytic transformation.
expected_behavior: The workflow should preserve the distinction between evidence, inference, uncertainty, and next action.
observed_behavior: The calibration record can route the case into expected behavior, limitation, and reviewer-needed fields without claiming independent expert validation.
limitation: Owner-generated calibration evidence; qualified expert review remains open.
